channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 2nd March
item.description:
More flytipping in this hot spot. Please can it be cleared and monitored

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Fridge abd several cabinets, 2nd March

Has been here weeks without council acting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holywell Close, Blackheath

In the bushes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Shopping trolley dumped, 2nd March
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refuse collectors left rubbish on street when a bag broke, 2nd March
item.description:
I have just witnessed the refuse collectors leave rubbish from a broken bag on Crystal Palace Road near the junction with East Dulwich Road. They definitely saw it there and let the driver just drive off quickly round the corner onto Easter DUlwich Road. The rubbish includes dirty nappies.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least 4 areas of potholes, 2nd March
item.description:
Poor surface repairs after gas / water connections

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes at the junction of John Penn Street and Lewisham Road, 2nd March
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewisham Road, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood dumped overnight, 2nd March
item.description:
Was not here yesterday when I litter picked.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balgowan Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large graffiti all along Lewisham Road, 2nd March
item.description:
On the front of several boarded up buildings on Lewisham Road between John Penn Street and the A2.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewisham Road, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported this yesterday it’s got worse, 2nd March
item.description:
The wood has now been joined by a fridge freezer and a bag of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Proper litter pick required in gardens at st Vincent house, grange walk, 2nd March
item.description:
A proper litter pic is required in the gardens of St. Vincent house on Grange walk especially near the bin area where there is repeated fly tipping however the smaller debris are always left so it makes it look like it’s a suitable area to dump more stuff. Please do a thorough litter pic of the entire gardens.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendall Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rest of Balgowan rubbish dumped, 2nd March
item.description:
As title see other report about this road sent couple minutes ago.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balgowan Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised pavements outside playground, 2nd March
item.description:
There are raised pavements which are a serious trip hazard outside the playground at the North Cray Neighbourhood Centre on the public highway. Previously reported reference 9010551
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Davis Way, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped all down one side of Balgowan, 2nd March
item.description:
As title. Couldn’t take photos of everything but household waste dumped at various places down Balgowan Road. Didn’t see any of this on my litter pick yesterday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timing check., 2nd March
item.description:
Appears issues of phasing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Road, Greater London

item.title: Household rubbish dumped outside 69 Shortlands road ...been there for several days, 2nd March
item.description:
Household and food waste in black bin liner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Water pouring from broken upper storey structural beam, 2nd March
item.description:
In the vicinity of 296 Cold Harbour Lane. I'd say very urgent structural engineer visit needed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 298, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
